SCHEDULE 1 — SERVICES

The Provider shall deliver strategic business advisory services over the duration of this Agreement, including but not limited to market entry analysis, financial modelling, and board-level presentation support.

**12. WARRANTIES AND REPRESENTATIONS**

12.1 Each party represents that it has full power and authority to enter into this Agreement.
12.2 The Provider warrants that the services shall be performed with reasonable care and skill.

**13. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY**

Neither party's total aggregate liability under this Agreement shall exceed the total fees paid or payable under it.

**14. DISPUTE RESOLUTION**

The parties shall attempt to resolve any dispute by good-faith negotiation within fourteen (14) days. Failing resolution, the dispute shall be referred to arbitration under the Arbitration and Mediation Act 2023 of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.

**15. TERMINATION**

15.1 Either party may terminate this Agreement on thirty (30) days' written notice.
15.2 On termination, the Client shall pay for all services performed up to the effective date of termination.
15.3 Clauses 6 (Confidentiality), 12 (Warranties), and this Clause 15 shall survive termination.

**16. GOVERNING LAW**

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria. The courts of Lagos State shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

**SIGNED** for and on behalf of Adewale Okonkwo Consulting Ltd.: ____________________

**SIGNED** for and on behalf of BrightPath Nigeria Ltd.: ____________________
